name: LB PHARMACEUTICALS INC
business: LB PHARMACEUTICALS INC is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing therapies for central nervous system disorders, primarily its lead product candidate LB-102 for the treatment of acute schizophrenia and other indications.

exposures.sentence: If our development efforts for LB-102 or any future product candidates are successful and result in regulatory approval, or license agreements with third parties, we may generate revenue in the future from product sales.
